description: Notification to Receive: Financial Institution identification must be a FinInstnId.
Notification must contain at least one Item (Ntfctn.Itm).
errorMessage: Notification to Receive must list at least one expected item (<Itm>).
fix: Add at least one <Itm> block describing the funds to be received.

description: Each Item must carry an Amt.
errorMessage: Each <Itm> must contain <Amt> (the expected amount).
fix: Add <Amt Ccy="USD">12345.67</Amt> inside the <Itm> block.

description: Expected Value Date should not be in the past (operational warning).
For further description on the usage of the field, pls refer to the CBPR Plus UHB.
errorMessage: For further description on the usage of the field, pls refer to the CBPR Plus UHB.

description:
The Business Message Identifier is the unique identifier of the Business Message instance that is being transported with this header, as defined by the sending application or system. 

Must contain the Message Identification element from the Group Header of the underlying message, where available (as is typically the case with pacs, pain, and camt messages, for example). If Message Identification is not available in the underlying message, then this field must contain the unique identifier of the Business Message instance.
errorMessage:
The Business Message Identifier is the unique identifier of the Business Message instance that is being transported with this header, as defined by the sending application or system. 

Must contain the Message Identification element from the Group Header of the underlying message, where available (as is typically the case with pacs, pain, and camt messages, for example). If Message Identification is not available in the underlying message, then this field must contain the unique identifier of the Business Message instance.

description: The Message Definition Identifier of the Business Message instance that is being transported with this header. In general, it must be formatted exactly as it appears in the namespace of the Business Message instance.

description:
This field may be used by SWIFT to support differentiated processing on SWIFT-administered services such as FINplus. For a description of reserved values, please refer to the Service Description for your service.

A user-specific value may be used, but please contact your Service Administrator before doing so to ensure alignment with general practice on your service.

description: If Postal Address is present then Name is mandatory.

		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/TownName] and [PostalAddress/Country] must be present 
		and there must be maximum '2' occurrences of [PostalAddress/AddressLine] 
	and for each [PostalAddress], if 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/Floor] is (are) present 
	then 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/TownName] and [PostalAddress/Country] must be present 
		and there must be maximum '2' occurrences of [PostalAddress/AddressLine] 
	and for each [PostalAddress], if 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/PostBox] is (are) present 
	then 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/TownName] and [PostalAddress/Country] must be present 
		and there must be maximum '2' occurrences of [PostalAddress/AddressLine] 
	and for each [PostalAddress], if 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/Room] is (are) present 
	then 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/TownName] and [PostalAddress/Country] must be present 
		and there must be maximum '2' occurrences of [PostalAddress/AddressLine] 
	and for each [PostalAddress], if 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/PostCode] is (are) present 
	then 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/TownName] and [PostalAddress/Country] must be present 
		and there must be maximum '2' occurrences of [PostalAddress/AddressLine] 
	and for each [PostalAddress], if 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/TownLocationName] is (are) present 
	then 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/TownName] and [PostalAddress/Country] must be present 
		and there must be maximum '2' occurrences of [PostalAddress/AddressLine] 
	and for each [PostalAddress], if 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/DistrictName] is (are) present 
	then 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/TownName] and [PostalAddress/Country] must be present 
		and there must be maximum '2' occurrences of [PostalAddress/AddressLine] 
	and for each [PostalAddress], if 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/CountrySubDivision] is (are) present 
	then 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/TownName] and [PostalAddress/Country] must be present 
		and there must be maximum '2' occurrences of [PostalAddress/AddressLine] 
	and for each [PostalAddress], if 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/TownName] is (are) present 
	then 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/TownName] and [PostalAddress/Country] must be present 
		and there must be maximum '2' occurrences of [PostalAddress/AddressLine] 
	and for each [PostalAddress], if 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/Country] is (are) present 
	then 
		at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/TownName] and [PostalAddress/Country] must be present 
		and there must be maximum '2' occurrences of [PostalAddress/AddressLine]

description: If Postal Address is present and if no other element than Address Line is present then every occurrence of Address Line must not exceed 35 characters.
errorMessage: If Postal Address is present and if no other element than Address Line is present then every occurrence of Address Line must not exceed 35 characters.
formal_rule:
For each [Full Message/Document/NotificationToReceiveV06/Notification/Item/IntermediaryAgent/FinancialInstitutionIdentification/PostalAddress], if 
	at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress] is (are) present 
	and at least one occurrence of the following element(s) [PostalAddress/AddressLine] is (are) present 
	and the following element(s) [PostalAddress/Department] and [PostalAddress/SubDepartment] and [PostalAddress/StreetName] and [PostalAddress/BuildingNumber] and [PostalAddress/BuildingName] and [PostalAddress/Floor] and [PostalAddress/PostBox] and [PostalAddress/Room] and [PostalAddress/PostCode] and [PostalAddress/TownName] and [PostalAddress/TownLocationName] and [PostalAddress/DistrictName] and [PostalAddress/CountrySubDivision] and [PostalAddress/Country] is (are) absent 
, then 
	every occurrence of [PostalAddress/AddressLine] must have a maximum length of '35' character(s)
expression: all(len(str(DATA[k])) <= 35 for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('PstlAdr.AdrLine'))

name: CBPR_Priority_Instruction_Priority_FormalRule
description: If AppHdr/Prty and CdtTrfTxInf/PmtTpInf/InstrPrty are both present, their values must be identical.
errorMessage: AppHdr <Prty> must match CdtTrfTxInf <InstrPrty> when both are present.
fix: Align <Prty> in AppHdr with <InstrPrty> in <PmtTpInf>.

name: CBPR_From_To_Instructing_Instructed_Agent_BIC_1_FormalRule
description: When AppHdr/CpyDplct is not COPY or CODU: AppHdr/Fr BICFI must match CdtTrfTxInf/InstgAgt BICFI, and AppHdr/To BICFI must match CdtTrfTxInf/InstdAgt BICFI.
errorMessage: AppHdr <Fr> BICFI must match <InstgAgt> BICFI and <To> BICFI must match <InstdAgt> BICFI (when CpyDplct is not COPY/CODU).
fix: Align AppHdr <Fr>/<To> BICFIs with CdtTrfTxInf <InstgAgt>/<InstdAgt> BICFIs.

name: CBPR_From_To_Instructing_Instructed_Agent_BIC_2_FormalRule
description: When AppHdr/CpyDplct is absent: AppHdr/Fr BICFI must match CdtTrfTxInf/InstgAgt BICFI, and AppHdr/To BICFI must match CdtTrfTxInf/InstdAgt BICFI.
errorMessage: AppHdr <Fr>/<To> BICFIs must match <InstgAgt>/<InstdAgt> BICFIs when <CpyDplct> is absent.
fix: Align AppHdr <Fr>/<To> BICFIs with CdtTrfTxInf <InstgAgt>/<InstdAgt> BICFIs.

name: CBPR_Business_Message_Identifier
description: BizMsgIdr must contain the MsgId from the GroupHeader of the underlying message where available.
errorMessage: AppHdr <BizMsgIdr> must match the underlying message <GrpHdr/MsgId> in camt.057.
fix: Set <BizMsgIdr> equal to <GrpHdr><MsgId>.

name: CBPR_Message_Definition_Identifier
description: MsgDefIdr must be 'camt.057.001.06' for camt.057 messages.
errorMessage: AppHdr <MsgDefIdr> must be 'camt.057.001.06' for camt.057 messages.
fix: Set <MsgDefIdr>camt.057.001.06</MsgDefIdr> in AppHdr.

name: CBPR_Business_Service_Usage_camt057
description: BizSvc must have the value 'swift.cbprplus.03'.
errorMessage: AppHdr <BizSvc> must be 'swift.cbprplus.03'.
fix: Set <BizSvc>swift.cbprplus.03</BizSvc> in AppHdr.

name: CBPR_Instruction_For_Creditor_Presence_Code_FormalRule
description: Each code value in CdtTrfTxInf/InstrForCdtrAgt/Cd can only be used once.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/InstrForCdtrAgt: each <Cd> value must appear at most once.
fix: Remove duplicate code values from <InstrForCdtrAgt>.

name: CBPR_Instruction_Identification_FormalRule
description: CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/InstrId must not start or end with '/' and must not contain '//'.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/InstrId must not start/end with '/' or contain '//'.
fix: Remove leading/trailing slashes and consecutive double slashes from <InstrId>.

name: CBPR_E2E_CORE_TextualRule
description: In pacs.009 CORE, the End-to-End identification is provided by the Debtor (Agent).
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/EndToEndId: must be provided by the Debtor (Agent) in pacs.009 CORE.

name: CBPR_End_To_End_Identification_FormalRule
description: CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/EndToEndId: in the first 16 characters, position 1 and position 16 cannot be '/', and the string must not contain '//'.
expression: not re.match(r'^/', str(VALUE)) and not re.match(r'^.{15}/', str(VALUE)) and not re.search(r'//', str(VALUE)[:16])
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/EndToEndId: first 16 chars must not start with '/', have '/' at position 16, or contain '//'.
fix: Ensure first 16 characters of <EndToEndId> do not start/end with '/' or contain '//'.

name: CBPR_E2E_CORE_ADV_TextualRule
description: If pacs.009 CORE covers pacs.009 ADV, EndToEndId should carry the InstrId of the underlying pacs.009 ADV.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/EndToEndId: should transport the <InstrId> of the underlying pacs.009 ADV when applicable.

name: CBPR_UETR_TextualRule
description: If pacs.009 is used to settle a pacs.009 Advice, the UETR should transport the UETR of the underlying pacs.009 Advice.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/UETR: should match the UETR of the underlying pacs.009 ADV when applicable.

name: CBPR_Local_Instrument_Guideline
description: LclInstrm: coded information (Cd) is preferred over proprietary (Prtry).
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/LclInstrm: coded information (<Cd>) is preferred over proprietary (<Prtry>).

name: CBPR_Category_Purpose_Guideline
description: CtgyPurp: coded information (Cd) is preferred over proprietary (Prtry).
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/CtgyPurp: coded information (<Cd>) is preferred over proprietary (<Prtry>).

name: CBPR_Interbank_Settlement_Currency_FormalRule
description: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrBkSttlmAmt/Ccy must not be XAU, XAG, XPD, or XPT (commodity codes).
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrBkSttlmAmt: <Ccy> must not be XAU, XAG, XPD, or XPT.
fix: Use a valid ISO 4217 currency code other than commodity codes.

name: CBPR_Agent_National_only_TextualRule
description: When DbtrAgt, CdtrAgt and all agents in between are in the same country, clearing code alone may be used.
errorMessage: Agent (national): ClrSysMmbId alone is permitted when all agents are in the same country.

name: CBPR_Agent_Option_1_TextualRule
description: Agent identification option 1 (preferred): BICFI, optionally complemented with LEI.
errorMessage: Agent Option 1 (preferred): use <BICFI>, optionally with <LEI>.

name: CBPR_Agent_Option_2
description: Agent option 2: if ClrSysMmbId OR LEI is present (without BICFI), then both Nm AND PstlAdr must also be present.
expression: all((not (robust_exists(k + '.ClrSysMmbId') or robust_exists(k + '.LEI'))) or robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.Nm')) and robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.PstlAdr')) for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.FinInstnId') and not robust_exists(k + '.BICFI'))
errorMessage: Agent Option 2: when ClrSysMmbId or LEI is used (without BICFI), <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present.
fix: Add <Nm> and <PstlAdr> inside <FinInstnId> when using ClrSysMmbId or LEI without BICFI.

name: CBPR_Agent_Option_3
description: Agent option 3: if Nm is present (without BICFI, ClrSysMmbId, or LEI), PstlAdr must be present.
expression: all(not robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.Nm')) or robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.PstlAdr')) for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.FinInstnId') and not robust_exists(k + '.BICFI') and not robust_exists(k + '.ClrSysMmbId') and not robust_exists(k + '.LEI'))
errorMessage: Agent Option 3: when Nm is present without BICFI/ClrSysMmbId/LEI, a <PstlAdr> must also be present.
fix: Add <PstlAdr> with at least <TwnNm> and <Ctry> inside <FinInstnId> when using Name-only identification.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Postal_Address_FormalRule_PrvsInstgAgt1

errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt1/FinInstnId: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present or both absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_Hybrid_Postal_Address

expression: all(not (any(k2.startswith(k.rsplit('.AdrLine',1)[0] + '.') and not k2.startswith(k.rsplit('.AdrLine',1)[0] + '.AdrLine') and k2.split('.')[-1] in ('StrtNm','BldgNb','BldgNm','Flr','PstBx','Room','PstCd','Dept','SubDept','TwnLctnNm','DstrctNm','CtrySubDvsn') for k2 in DATA.keys())) for k in DATA.keys() if '.PstlAdr.AdrLine' in k)
errorMessage: PstlAdr hybrid mode: detail structured fields (StrtNm, BldgNb, PstCd etc.) must not coexist with <AdrLine>. Use hybrid (TwnNm + Ctry + AdrLine) or pure structured (no AdrLine).

name: CBPR_Hybrid_TwnNm_Ctry_Mandatory

errorMessage: PstlAdr hybrid mode: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> are mandatory when <AdrLine> is present.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry> to the PstlAdr block that contains <AdrLine>.

errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/DbtrAgt/FinInstnId: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present or both absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Structured_DbtrAgt
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/DbtrAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if AdrLine absent, TwnNm and Ctry must be present.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/DbtrAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr (Structured): <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory when <AdrLine> absent.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry> inside <PstlAdr>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Hybrid_DbtrAgt
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/DbtrAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if AdrLine and other element present, TwnNm and Ctry mandatory; max 2 AdrLine.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/DbtrAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr (Hybrid): <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory; max 2 <AdrLine>.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>; limit <AdrLine> to 2 occurrences.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Unstructured_DbtrAgt
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/DbtrAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if only AdrLine present, each must not exceed 35 characters.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/DbtrAgt/FinInstnId/PstlAdr (Unstructured): each <AdrLine> max 35 characters.
fix: Reduce each <AdrLine> to 35 characters or fewer.

description: If pacs.009 settles a pacs.009 Advice, the last available occurrence of InstrForCdtrAgt/InstrInf preceded by /UDLC/ must capture the underlying creditor (/UDLC/) from the pacs.009 Advice.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/InstrForCdtrAgt/InstrInf: last occurrence prefixed /UDLC/ must carry the underlying creditor from the pacs.009 ADV.

name: CBPR_Purpose_Guideline
description: Purp: coded information (Cd) is preferred over proprietary (Prtry).
